prestazioni: Engine swap to a **13B-REW** (rotary twin-turbo, 1.3L) from the Mazda RX-7 FD3S, retaining the original 3-speed THM400 automatic transmission but upgrading to a **PTC 4L80E** standalone transmission controller for precise shift tuning and torque converter lockup control. The 13B-REW will be built with **MazdaSpeed FD3S forged internals** (e.g., **TII Racing apex seals**, **H-beam rods**, and **JE forged pistons**) and paired with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) for a target of 550whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** managing boost via a **TurboSmart e-Boost2** controller.

Custom **rotary-specific cooling system** featuring a **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** (with **Mocal sandwich plate adapter**) and a **Koyorad RS-Q Series aluminum radiator** (36mm core, dual 12" SPAL fans) to mitigate the Roadpacer's notorious thermal issues. The stock **1G-GZE** (2.0L inline-6) cooling system is entirely scrapped in favor of a **rotary-optimized setup** with a **Moroso 8-quart oil pan** and **MazdaSpeed FD3S oil pump** for improved lubrication under high-RPM loads.

Suspension overhaul using **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Roadpacer's 1,700kg weight) with **polyurethane bushings** from **SuperPro** (part #SPF0115K) for the front A-arms and **Energy Suspension** (part #9.5104G) for the rear trailing arms. The stock **recirculating ball steering** is replaced with a **Mazda RX-3 rack-and-pinion conversion** (using **Korman Motorsports** adapter kit) for sharper turn-in, paired with **Nardi Deep Corn 380mm steering wheel** and **NRG quick-release hub** for driver feedback.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody kit (custom-fabricated for the Roadpacer's 1970s sedan proportions), featuring **carbon fiber fenders** (with **15mm extended wheel arches**), **aluminum overfenders** (hand-beaten to match the original body lines), and a **ducktail spoiler** (modeled after the **1975 Mazda Cosmo AP RX-5**). The kit includes **custom side skirts** with integrated **LED turn signals** (using **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** for a JDM retro-futuristic look).

Bespoke **rotary-themed interior** with **Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats** (upholstered in **Nappa leather with Alcantara suede inserts**, color-matched to **Mazda Soul Red Crystal**), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (with **13B-REW rotary emblem** in the center), and **custom gauge cluster** featuring **Defi Advance BF gauges** (oil pressure, oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted in a **carbon fiber dash overlay** (fabricated by **Seibon Carbon**). The rear seats are removed and replaced with a **custom aluminum storage box** (for **rotary tools and spare apex seals**) and a **Harman Kardon** sound system (with **JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer** in a sealed enclosure).

Wheel setup: **Work Meister S1 3P 18x10 +15 front / 18x11 +20 rear** (staggered fitment with **245/35/18 front and 275/30/18 rear** Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires). The wheels are finished in **Gunmetal with polished lips** and feature **custom center caps** with the **Mazda Roadpacer AP badge**. Brake system: **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** (front, with **380mm two-piece rotors**) and **4-piston calipers** (rear, with **355mm rotors**), paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines** for consistent pedal feel.
